description: Apply the established brand design system (glassmorphism, asymmetric layouts, uppercase wayfinding labels, rounded-3xl cards, standard Button CTAs) to all non-product marketing pages: Home, About, Features, Pricing, Services, and Contact.
deviation_notes: Generated 2 images (about-classroom.jpg, about-team.jpg) for the About page redesign. Home page hardcoded stats (10,000+, 12) left as-is since no locale keys exist for them. Scope expanded to include services/blended-learning and services/managed-service pages. Fixed broken Overview section on managed-service (was missing text content).
